name: bricklayer
description: AI research campaign + autonomous build framework. Research campaigns, simulations, agent fleet, findings synthesis, and automated build/fix/verify pipelines.
author: BrickLayer

commands.name: masonry-run
commands.description: Start or resume a BrickLayer 2.0 research campaign

commands.name: masonry-status
commands.description: Show campaign progress, question counts, findings summary

commands.name: masonry-fleet
commands.description: Fleet health — agent scores, add/retire agents

commands.name: build
commands.description: Agent-mode build — TDD pipeline, commits per task

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Targeted fix — reads verify-report, max 3 cycles

commands.name: ui-compose
commands.description: Agent-mode UI build from design brief

commands.name: visual-report
commands.description: Convert synthesis.md to navigable HTML report

commands.name: teach-bricklayer
commands.description: Context Gathering Protocol — one-time project setup

agents.name: mortar
agents.description: Master executor and router for all requests

agents.name: trowel
agents.description: Campaign conductor — owns BL 2.0 research loop

agents.name: spec-writer
agents.description: Transforms task requests into buildable specs

agents.name: diagnose-analyst
agents.description: Root cause analysis for unknown failures

agents.name: uiux-master
agents.description: Dark dashboard UI/UX design and implementation

mcpServers.name: masonry
mcpServers.description: Core BrickLayer MCP server with 20+ tools
